lines: Year 1: Critical life support component fails.
Ares investigates but finds nothing unusual.
Selene investigates but finds nothing unusual.
Kai investigates but finds nothing unusual.
Zephyr investigates but finds nothing unusual.
Ignis investigates but finds nothing unusual.
Year 2: Large ice vein found during excavation.
Year 3: Solar flare disrupts electronics and communication.
Year 4: Anomalous signal detected from Olympus Mons.
Terra investigates but finds nothing unusual.
Marina investigates but finds nothing unusual.
Year 5: Meteor shower damages outer habitat modules.
Year 6: Anomalous signal detected from Olympus Mons.
Year 7: Underground water ice deposit discovered!
Year 8: Underground water ice deposit discovered!
Year 9: Meteor shower damages outer habitat modules.
Year 10: Critical life support component fails.
Year 11: Engineered fungi bloom in the greenhouse.
Year 12: A relatively uneventful year on Mars.
Year 13: Multiple colonists report shared vivid dreams.
Year 14: A massive dust storm engulfs the colony for weeks.
Year 15: Multiple colonists report shared vivid dreams.
Year 16: Solar flare disrupts electronics and communication.
Year 17: A relatively uneventful year on Mars.
Year 18: Underground water ice deposit discovered!
Marina shares Earth's message. Resolve rises colony-wide.
Year 20: Multiple colonists report shared vivid dreams.
Year 21: A relatively uneventful year on Mars.
Year 22: A massive dust storm engulfs the colony for weeks.
Year 25: Critical life support component fails.
Year 26: A massive dust storm engulfs the colony for weeks.
Year 27: Multiple colonists report shared vivid dreams.
Year 28: Underground water ice deposit discovered!
Year 29: Solar flare disrupts electronics and communication.
Year 30: Multiple colonists report shared vivid dreams.
Marina shares Earth's message. Resolve rises colony-wide.
Year 32: Anomalous signal detected from Olympus Mons.
Year 33: A relatively uneventful year on Mars.
Marina investigates but finds nothing unusual.
Year 35: Underground water ice deposit discovered!
Year 36: Underground water ice deposit discovered!
Year 37: Large ice vein found during excavation.
Year 38: Critical life support component fails.
Year 39: Multiple colonists report shared vivid dreams.
Year 40: A massive dust storm engulfs the colony for weeks.
Year 41: Underground water ice deposit discovered!
Year 42: Engineered fungi bloom in the greenhouse.
Year 43: Multiple colonists report shared vivid dreams.
Year 44: Multiple colonists report shared vivid dreams.
Year 45: Critical life support component fails.
